name: Cafe Francais
recipeIngredient: 3 cups hot coffee, freshly brewed (French roast preferred)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream until fluffy.
2. Gradually add the confectioners sugar and continue beating until stiff peaks form.
3. Divide the mixture evenly among 4 coffee cups.
4. Stir the vanilla extract into the hot coffee.
5. Fill all four coffee cups with the coffee mixture. Do not stir.
6. Serve immediately.
YIELD: 4 servings
